notes: I ran Space Quest I, IV, and V.  With SQ 1, I ran through the opening sequence until the game started where Roger was standing there.  I didn't know how to move him, but I could enter commands, all of which were bad guesses.  In SQ V, I let it start and the intro worked fine.  I quit, then went to my favorite... SQ IV.  I ran it for about 5 minutes.  All controls worked fine.  I ran into no issues.
title: Space Quest™ Collection

notes: Some of the games are crashing.
title: Space Quest™ Collection
